title: FssConfig
description: FSS (Functional Style Sheet) configuration. Place this at the project root as fss.config.json. Every field is optional; missing fields fall back to FSS defaults.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor autocomplete.

layer.description: @layer name for the cascade-isolation wrapper. Use null to disable the @layer wrap entirely.

importSource.description: Module specifier the parser recognizes as the source of `fss`. Renamed imports (`{ fss as ff }`) are honored automatically.

prefix.description: Prefix prepended to every generated class name.

length.description: Hex characters of SHA-1 digest used as the hash. 8 is enough for ~tens of thousands of unique rules; bump to 10–12 for very large apps.

sort.description: Cascade direction for width-based @media queries. Mobile-first sorts min-width ascending and max-width descending; desktop-first reverses both.

mode.description: rule-per-class: one rule per className with declarations baked in. shared-by-declaration: one rule per (property, value) with grouped selectors. Phase 4+ feature; recognized but not yet implemented.

lightningcss.description: Optional lightningcss post-processing of the emitted CSS. Phase 5+ feature; recognized but not yet implemented.
